message:
feat(ir): add unary ops, delete property, nullish jumps, and short-circuit lowering

Extends IR1/IR3 with UnaryNeg/Plus/LogicalNot/BitNot/TypeOf/Void,
DeleteProperty, JumpIfTruthy/JumpIfFalsyConsume/JumpIfNullish.

ir_contract.rs: Add 6 unary IR3 instructions, DeleteProperty, and
JumpIfNullish to the instruction enum with canonical_value() serialization.
Add JumpIfFalsyConsume, JumpIfTruthy, JumpIfNullish, DeleteProperty to IR1.

lowering_pipeline.rs: Rewrite logical operator (&&, ||, ??) lowering from
Move stubs to proper short-circuit branch sequences using new jump ops and
internal temp bindings. delete-expression now lowers through DeleteProperty
for member expressions or literal true for non-member targets. UnaryOp
dispatches each operator to its correct IR3 instruction. Includes rustfmt
reformatting of binary operator and compound assignment match arms.

execution_orchestrator.rs: Add opcode name strings and CFG edge computation
for all new instructions including JumpIfNullish.

lib.rs: Register ts_normalization_evidence module, add new instructions
to ir3_destination_register.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
